scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run free-ports && npm run dev
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:supabase-cbr: npx supabase functions deploy cbr-quote --project-ref glhfrchbzmxxlftswfck
